html:
{%- set item_code = (doc.item or "") -%} {# MI1-I62: parse the filament-count digit from the Item code, e.g. "210/72 7.2 GPD" -> 72. Falls back to blank if the code isn't slash-formed. #} {%- set parts = item_code.split("/") -%} {%- set cone_val = "" -%} {%- if parts|length > 1 -%} {%- set after = parts[1].split()[0] if parts[1] else "" -%} {%- set digits = after|reject("equalto", "")|list -%} {# strip non-digits from leading token #} {%- set cone_val = after.split(".")[0] if after else "" -%} {%- endif -%} {%- set serial = doc.custom_supplier_batch_no or doc.name -%} {%- set qr_payload = (doc.custom_cone|string) + "_" + (doc.custom_container_no or "") + "_" + (doc.custom_lot_no or "") -%}
{# MI1-I62 TODO: Gross Wt has no source field in mhr today. Showing blank until a 'custom_gross_weight' field is added to Batch (or Batch Items child). Once added, swap the value below. #}
Container No.{{ doc.custom_container_no or "" }}
Pallet No.{{ doc.custom_cone or "" }}
Den/Fil{{ item_code }}
Cone{{ cone_val }}
Net Wt{{ "%.3f"|format(doc.batch_qty|float) if doc.batch_qty is not none else "" }}
Gross Wt{{ doc.get("custom_gross_weight", "") }}
Grade{{ doc.custom_grade or "" }}
Luster{{ doc.custom_lusture or "" }}
TypePALLET
Lot No.{{ doc.custom_lot_no or "" }}
{{ serial }}
{{ qr_payload }}.
name: HTY Batch Label
